privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic child welfare case planning task for a Kentucky family (Martinez/Gutierrez family). The case number is JC-2024-0847-JCFC filed in Jefferson County Family Court, Division 12. The case involves substantiated neglect allegations against Elena Teresa Martinez (DOB 1990-04-18). Three children are involved: Sofia Lucia (age 8), Diego Rafael (age 5), and Isabella Marie (age 2). The case plan must include structured sections (minimum 7 Heading 1 sections, 5 Heading 2 subsections) with at least 3 tables covering case goals, service referrals, and visitation schedules. Key goals address housing stability, parenting education, substance abuse assessment, and school attendance. Service providers include Centerstone Kentucky and Volunteers of America Mid-States. The document must be saved as an OpenOffice Writer ODT file (minimum 8KB) with table of contents and page numbers. All data is synthetically generated for training purposes.
